stemHtml: You are flying a twin engine jet aeroplane when both engine driven AC generators fail. The aircraft is fitted with an auxiliary power unit (APU). What is the best action to take?

options.a: Start the APU so that it can power AC consumers.
options.b: Deploy the RAT to generate emergency electrical power.
options.c: Use the batteries to power essential DC systems.
options.d: Continue flying without taking action, as essential systems will remain operational indefinitely.
